Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.util

Class LightcoreAdapterFactory

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.AdapterFactoryImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.util.LightcoreAdapterFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.AdapterFactory
public class LightcoreAdapterFactory extends org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.AdapterFactoryImpl
The Adapter Factory for the model. It provides an adapter createXXX method for each class of the model.
See Also:
  • LightcorePackage

    Creates an instance of the adapter factory.

  • Constructor Details

    • LightcoreAdapterFactory

      public LightcoreAdapterFactory()
      Creates an instance of the adapter factory.

  • Method Details

    • isFactoryForType

      public boolean isFactoryForType(Object object)
      Returns whether this factory is applicable for the type of the object. This implementation returns true if the object is either the model's package or is an instance object of the model.
      Specified by:
      isFactoryForType in interface org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.AdapterFactory
      Overrides:
      isFactoryForType in class org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.AdapterFactoryImpl
      Returns:
      whether this factory is applicable for the type of the object.

    • createAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createAdapter(org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier target)
      Creates an adapter for the target.
      Parameters:
      target - the object to adapt.
      Returns:
      the adapter for the target.

    • createLightObjectAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createLightObjectAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'Light Object'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.
      See Also:
      • LightObject

    • createLightElementAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createLightElementAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'Light Element'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.
      See Also:
      • LightElement

    • createStringToAttributeMapEntryAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createStringToAttributeMapEntryAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'String To Attribute Map Entry'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.
      See Also:
      • Map.Entry

    • createAttributeAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createAttributeAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'Attribute'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.
      See Also:
      • Attribute

    • createInternalElementAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createInternalElementAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'Internal Element'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.
      See Also:

    • createImplicitElementAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createImplicitElementAdapter()
      Creates a new adapter for an object of class 'Implicit Element'. This default implementation returns null so that we can easily ignore cases; it's useful to ignore a case when inheritance will catch all the cases anyway.
      Returns:
      the new adapter.

    • createILElementAdapter

      Returns:
      the new adapter.

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createILAttributeAdapter()

    • createEObjectAdapter

      public org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter createEObjectAdapter()

      the new adapter.
